title: Agraulus alpinus
taxonomy: Agraulus alpinus is classified as a species of beetle within the family Chrysomelidae. This family includes leaf beetles, which are known for their role in controlling plant populations. Agraulus alpinus, specifically, is a type of leaf beetle that is adapted to high-altitude environments. The classification of Agraulus alpinus reflects its evolutionary adaptations to its specific ecological niche. Further classification of Agraulus alpinus places it within the subfamily Chrysomelinae.

Its leaves and roots are reported to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects.
